import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

# Set seaborn style
sns.set_style("whitegrid")

# Step size
h = 0.1

# Create x values
x = np.arange(0, 2 * np.pi, h)

# Compute y = sin(x)
y = np.sin(x)

# Forward finite difference approximation
dy_forward = (y[1:] - y[:-1]) / h

# Corresponding x values
x_forward = x[:-1]

# Exact derivative
dy_exact = np.cos(x_forward)

# Compute maximum error
max_error = np.max(np.abs(dy_forward - dy_exact))

# Plot results
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.plot(x_forward, dy_forward, label='Forward Finite Difference')
plt.plot(x_forward, dy_exact, label='Exact Derivative cos(x)')

# Add legend
plt.legend()

# Show plot
plt.show()

# Print maximum error
print("Maximum Error =", max_error)
